resources.string: capture_apps
Audio app capture selection
Choose which visible apps Android is asked to include or exclude from rootless playback capture

This screen controls Android’s playback-capture request by app UID, so apps sharing a UID are affected together. Existing session exclusions still apply. This cannot bypass an app’s capture policy, DRM, protected audio path, or package-visibility limits. Amazon Music capture is unverified and may be blocked. Android exposes no reliable list of capturable audio apps, so all visible installed apps are shown.
Exclude checked apps; request other capturable apps
Allow only checked apps; request no other apps

plurals.name: capture_policy_exclude_status
plurals.item: Other capturable apps requested; %1$d selected package excluded.
Other capturable apps requested; %1$d selected packages excluded.

plurals.name: capture_policy_allow_status
plurals.item: Only %1$d selected package is requested; Android may still block its PCM.
Only %1$d selected packages are requested; Android may still block their PCM.

resources.string: No external app package is selected, so no external app PCM is requested.

plurals.name: capture_legacy_uid_warning
plurals.item: %1$d legacy raw UID rule is also active and will be retained.
%1$d legacy raw UID rules are also active and will be retained.

resources.string: Clear UID rules
Legacy UID rules will be cleared only if you save this policy.
Filter visible apps or package names
Loading visible installed apps
Android did not return a visible app list. Saved selections are retained and remain removable.
No visible apps match this filter.
Save capture policy
Capture policy saved. An active rootless session will rebuild its capture request.
%1$s · UID %2$d
%1$s · system app · UID %2$d
%1$s · disabled · UID %2$d
%1$s · not installed or not visible; saved selection retained
Change capture selection for %1$s
